title: Sublime performances at the Knysna Heads Marathon
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Heads Marathon saw...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Heads Marathon saw sublime performances this morning, 8 March with Ignatious Ncube taking the top spot in the highly anticipated 42.2km marathon.

The race started bright and early at 06:00 at the scenic Thesen Island in Knysna. Following closely behind Ncube was Tholinhlanhla Shabalala, who secured a second-place finish.


> In the women’s 42.2km marathon, Catherine Williamson emerged as the first female athlete to cross the finish line.


Catherine Williamson

In addition to the 42.2km marathon, athletes took part in a 5km fun run, a 10km race, and the 21.1km half marathon.


> The 42,2 km is a Comrades Marathon qualifying race.


Read more about the winners in this weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’

For more George Herald news, follow us on
                    Facebook,
                    X and
                    Instagram.

You can also check out our videos on our
                    YouTube channel or follow us on
                    TikTok.
